positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for luke_conclusion_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~is_baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth_with_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complain_about_siblings(X0) := $false

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for luke_conclusion_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~is_baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    lives_at_home(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    spend_time_with_siblings(luke)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth_with_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complain_about_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
